title: 4th Workshop on Maritime Computer Vision (MaCVi): Challenge Overview
abstract: 第四届海洋计算机视觉研讨会（MaCVi）作为CVPR 2026的组成部分成功举办。本届研讨会聚焦五大基准挑战，同时强调预测精度与嵌入式实时可行性两大核心指标。本报告全面概述了MaCVi 2026挑战赛的赛题设置、评估方案、数据集及基准测试赛道，并通过定量结果、定性比较以及跨挑战的方法趋势分析，系统呈现了研究成果。我们收录了顶尖参赛团队的技术报告，重点阐释基准测试套件中的实用设计策略与经验教训。数据集、排行榜及挑战资源可通过https://macvi.org/workshop/cvpr26获取。
preview_text: The 4th Workshop on Maritime Computer Vision (MaCVi) is organized as part of CVPR 2026. This edition features five benchmark challenges with emphasis on both predictive accuracy and embedded real-time feasibility. This report summarizes the MaCVi 2026 challenge setup, evaluation protocols, datasets, and benchmark tracks, and presents quantitative results, qualitative comparisons, and cross-challenge analyses of emerging method trends. We also include technical reports from top-performing teams to highlight practical design choices and lessons learned across the benchmark suite. Datasets, leaderboards, and challenge resources are available at https://macvi.org/workshop/cvpr26.
one_line_summary: 该论文是关于海事计算机视觉的研讨会挑战赛概述，与强化学习、VLA、机器人控制等关键词无关。
